2026-04-01T06:42:42.0619140Z   • If using a Fine-Grained PAT, ensure it has the 'Copilot Requests' permission enabled
2026-04-01T06:42:42.0619984Z   • If using COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN or GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable, verify the token is valid and not expired
